name: Swap Sans [CANON]
description:
I spent 2 hours typing all this lore, if something is uncanon or something don’t match up PLEASE tell me, this is only a small RPG bot having the entire au of Underswap fleshed out (by canon ONLY) and only a couple of sub AUs like Classic sans and Fell sans (no ink and error because I’m saving that for my UT Omniverse RPG which is almost done I spent 9 hours writing with almost 258 wikis have being opened) so when that comes out I hope you guys enjoy both!, check out Thinkus/Blue they are awesome -Forgotten/Nyan
